title: International Registered Students
content:
International Registered Students

Documents Required for Registration

Okan Homepage

Administrative

Registration

Documents Required for Registration

MENU

Documents Required for Registration

The official high school diploma

The official transcript of records showing all courses and
grades taken in the entire high school education.
(Translated into Turkish or English)

The “Equivalency Certificate”, which verifies the
equivalency of your High School Diploma to a Turkish High School Diploma, can
be obtained either from the Turkish Embassy at your home country or from the
Ministry of Education in Turkey, after your arrival.

Please find
the

list of Turkish Consulates / Embassies

where you can apply for equivalency
certificate. If
your country is not on the list, please provide the following documents for your Equivalency Certificate.

The original and the copy of high school diploma (translated into
English or Turkish by certified translators)

Transcript of records for all the years of high school education (should
show the credit hours and grades and be translated into English or Turkish by
certified translator)

The original and the copies of the residency permit in Turkey or
education visa

The original and the copy of the passport page with photo

Original national or International examination result

Original certificate of the English language proficiency test score

(Please click the link for more information)

Original Turkish language test score

(For international students who will study in Turkish Programmes) (Please click the link for more information)

Original and the copy of your passport pages including picture, identification information and visa      stamp

2 biometric photographs

Tuition fee payment receipt

Birth Certificate for Students who are under 18 years old by the time of the registration

(Please click the link for more information)

Official ‘Acceptance Letter’      sent by the Istanbul Okan University

Full coverage Health insurance. You may get further assistance from      the International Students Office staff during your registration
